---
title: "03 Spatial Domains"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("01_main_setup.R")
module <- "03_spatial_domains"
```

```{r}
domains <- read_optional_tsv(file.path(result_dir, "07_spatial_domains", "tables", "spatial_domain_counts.tsv"))
if (nrow(domains) > 0) {
  write_review_table(domains, module, "spatial_domain_counts_review.csv")
  p <- domains |>
    ggplot(aes(sample, n_spots, fill = spatial_domain)) +
    geom_col(position = "fill") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = rep(pandoraseq_palette, 50)) +
    theme_spatial() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Fraction of spots")
  save_plot_versions(p, module, "spatial_domain_fraction_by_sample", width = 8, height = 5)
  p
}
```
